hero.name: Gregor Krykon
hero.title: Automation Engineer · Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I automate the tedious, build the essential — and ship things that keep running.

about.heading: About Me
about.body1: I'm Gregor — a developer based in Bavaria who got hooked on building things at 15 and never stopped.
about.body2: I started with game development, moved into web shops, and eventually found my groove in automation and full-stack development. Today I work as an apprentice software developer at Fellowpro, specialising in CI/CD, test automation, and DevOps — while running my own projects and self-hosted infrastructure in my spare time.
about.body3: My approach: ship something that works, then make it solid. No endless planning, no perfectionism paralysis — just consistent, tested, real output.
about.body4: If you need a website, an app, or a system that takes the manual work off your plate — let's talk.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Reach out — I'd love to hear from you.
